info.name: Kanzza Backend API - Laravel 13
info.description: Koleksi pengujian API Kanzza Frozen Food. Base URL produksi: https://kanza.djncloud.my.id/api/v1. Gunakan urutan pengujian pada file panduan. Pembayaran menggunakan Midtrans Snap tanpa webhook; setelah pembayaran, jalankan endpoint Check Payment Status.

request.description: Endpoint pertama yang harus dites. Tidak membutuhkan token.

body.raw:
{
  "category_id": "{{category_id}}",
  "sku": "KZ-POSTMAN-{{$timestamp}}",
  "name": "Frozen Food Postman {{$timestamp}}",
  "slug": "frozen-food-postman-{{$timestamp}}",
  "description": "Produk pengujian API Postman",
  "cost_price": 20000,
  "selling_price": 30000,
  "stock": 100,
  "minimum_stock": 10,
  "unit": "pack",
  "is_active": true
}
